# Display results -------------------------------------------------------------
rough_point_candidates <- format_candidates(print_candidates(
  best_prop_point_rough,
  best_eol_point_rough
))

rough_ci_candidates <- format_candidates(print_candidates(
  best_prop_ci_rough,
  best_eol_ci_rough
))

kable(
  rough_point_candidates,
  digits = 4,
  col.names = c(
    "Policy",
    "Alpha",
    "Deductible",
    "Ruin Probability",
    "CI Lower",
    "CI Upper",
    "Expected Profit"
  ),
  caption = "Rough best contracts under point estimate constraint"
)
caption = "Rough best contracts under Wilson upper bound constraint"
